title: cryptocarya peumus var. stenantha
intro: Cryptocarya peumus var. stenantha, also known as a variant of the Peumus boldus or Boldo tree, is a plant species native to Chile and Argentina, belonging to the Lauraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain alkaloids like boldine, having anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Cryptocarya peumus var. stenantha include relief from digestive issues, liver and kidney protection, and reduction of inflammation. Traditionally, the leaves are used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
